/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/commandframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/dialogs/dialog_template_selector_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/dialogs/dialog_template_selector.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/files-io.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/import_project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/kicad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/mainframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/menubar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/prjconfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/project_template.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/tree_project_frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/treeprojectfiles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad.dir/treeproject_item.cpp.o -o kicad  ../common/libcommon.a ../common/libgal.a -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2 -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU ../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../polygon/libpolygon.a -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2
